pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to the critical access control issue where the burn function is publicly callable without restrictions. SWC-107 is relevant because the contract lacks protections against the approve race condition, as it implements the standard approve function without mitigation mechanisms like increaseAllowance/decreaseAllowance. Evidence: Finding 8: burn function is publicly callable without access controls; Finding 11: approve function lacks race condition mitigation; Contract inherits from OpenZeppelin but has unsecured privileged functions
